member.name: T:CompositeScoringConfig
member.summary: Configuration options for composite document scoring. Can be loaded from appsettings.json.

member.name: F:CompositeScoringConfig.SectionName
member.summary: Section name in configuration file.

member.name: P:CompositeScoringConfig.Enabled
member.summary: Whether composite scoring is enabled. Default: false (backwards compatible)

member.name: P:CompositeScoringConfig.UseLLMTagScoring
member.summary: Whether to use LLM-based tag scoring. If false, uses NoOpTagScoringService (neutral scores). Default: true

member.name: P:CompositeScoringConfig.TagScoreCacheHours
member.summary: Maximum age of cached tag scores in hours. Older scores will be recomputed. Default: 24 hours

member.name: P:CompositeScoringConfig.CosineSimilarityWeight
member.summary: Weight for cosine similarity score (0.0 to 1.0). Default: 0.5

member.name: P:CompositeScoringConfig.TagScoreWeight
member.summary: Weight for tag-based relevance score (0.0 to 1.0). Default: 0.3

member.name: P:CompositeScoringConfig.RecencyWeight
member.summary: Weight for recency boost (0.0 to 1.0). Default: 0.1

member.name: P:CompositeScoringConfig.PositionWeight
member.summary: Weight for position boost (0.0 to 1.0). Default: 0.1

member.name: P:CompositeScoringConfig.RecencyHalfLifeDays
member.summary: Number of days until recency score halves. Default: 30 days

member.name: P:CompositeScoringConfig.TagAggregation
member.summary: Tag aggregation method: Maximum, Average, or Sum. Default: Maximum

member.name: P:CompositeScoringConfig.MinimumScore
member.summary: Minimum composite score threshold. Documents below this are filtered out. Default: 0.0 (no filtering)

member.name: M:CompositeScoringConfig.ToScoringOptions
member.summary: Convert configuration to ScoringOptions.

member.name: M:CompositeScoringConfig.GetCacheAge
member.summary: Get cache age as TimeSpan.

member.name: T:IChunkSetStore
member.summary: Interface for storing and retrieving chunk sets. Chunk sets represent logical groupings of chunks with collective summaries.

member.name: M:IChunkSetStore.StoreAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ChunkSet})
member.summary: Store chunk sets for a document.
member.param: Collection of chunk sets to store.
member.returns: True if successful.

member.name: M:IChunkSetStore.GetAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Get all chunk sets for a document.
member.returns: Collection of chunk sets, or empty if none exist.

member.name: M:IChunkSetStore.GetByIdAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific chunk set by ID.
member.returns: The chunk set, or null if not found.

member.name: M:IChunkSetStore.RemoveAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Remove all chunk sets for a document.
member.returns: True if successful.

member.name: M:IChunkSetStore.ListDocumentIdsAsync
member.summary: List all document IDs that have chunk sets.
member.returns: Collection of document IDs.

member.name: M:IChunkStore.GetParentDocument(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the parent document key for a given chunk key
member.returns: The parent document key, or null if not found

member.name: T:ICompositeScorer
member.summary: Service for computing composite document scores from multiple signals. Combines cosine similarity, tag relevance, recency, and position.

member.name: M:ICompositeScorer.Score(ScoredDocument,TagRelevanceIndex,System.Int32,System.Int32,ScoringOptions)
member.summary: Score a single document using all available signals.
member.param: Tag relevance scores for current query
member.returns: Document with all scores computed

member.name: M:ICompositeScorer.ScoreAndRank(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ScoredDocument},TagRelevanceIndex,ScoringOptions)
member.summary: Score and rank a list of documents.
member.param: Tag relevance scores for current query
member.returns: Documents scored and sorted by composite score (descending)

member.name: M:ICompositeScorer.ScoreAndRankAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ScoredDocument},TagRelevanceIndex,ScoringOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Async version of ScoreAndRank for large document sets.

member.name: M:ICompositeScorer.ScoreAndRankWithExplanations(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ScoredDocument},TagRelevanceIndex,ScoringOptions)
member.summary: Score and rank documents with detailed explanations.
member.param: Tag relevance scores for current query
member.returns: Documents with scores and explanations, sorted by composite score

member.name: T:IDocumentGraphStore
member.summary: Store for document relationships and graph queries.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.AddRelationshipAsync(DocumentRelationship,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add a relationship between two documents.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.AddRelationshipsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{DocumentRelationship},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add multiple relationships.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.GetRelationshipAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a specific relationship by ID.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.GetDocumentNodeAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all relationships for a document.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.GetOutgoingRelationshipsAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{RelationshipType},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get outgoing relationships from a document.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.GetIncomingRelationshipsAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{RelationshipType},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get incoming relationships to a document.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.GetRelationshipsBetweenAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Find relationships between two specific documents.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.TraverseAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{RelationshipType},System.Double,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Traverse the graph from a starting document.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.FindSupportingDocumentsAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Find supporting documents for a given document.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.FindContradictingDocumentsAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Find contradicting documents for a given document.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.FindCitingDocumentsAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Find documents that cite the given document.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.UpdateRelationshipAsync(DocumentRelationship,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update an existing relationship.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.DeleteRelationshipAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete a relationship.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.DeleteDocumentRelationshipsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete all relationships for a document.

member.name: M:IDocumentGraphStore.GetStatisticsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get graph statistics.

member.name: T:GraphStatistics
member.summary: Statistics about the document graph.

member.name: P:GraphStatistics.TotalDocuments
member.summary: Total number of documents with relationships.

member.name: P:GraphStatistics.TotalRelationships
member.summary: Total number of relationships.

member.name: P:GraphStatistics.RelationshipsByType
member.summary: Relationships by type.

member.name: P:GraphStatistics.AverageRelationshipsPerDocument
member.summary: Average relationships per document.

member.name: P:GraphStatistics.MostConnectedDocumentId
member.summary: Document with most relationships.

member.name: P:GraphStatistics.MaxRelationships
member.summary: Maximum relationships on any document.

member.name: T:IQueryableMetadataStore
member.summary: Extended interface for metadata querying. Implement this alongside IDocumentMetadataStore to enable metadata-first search.

member.name: M:IQueryableMetadataStore.QueryAsync(MetadataFilter,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Query metadata using filters. Returns all matching documents.

member.name: M:IQueryableMetadataStore.GetMatchingIdsAsync(MetadataFilter,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all document IDs matching the filter (lightweight query).

member.name: M:IQueryableMetadataStore.CountAsync(MetadataFilter,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Count documents matching the filter.

member.name: M:IQueryableMetadataStore.SearchTextAsync(System.String,MetadataFilter,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Full-text search on content/summary fields.

member.name: T:MetadataFilter
member.summary: Filter criteria for metadata queries. All conditions are AND-ed together.

member.name: P:MetadataFilter.MimeType
member.summary: Filter by MIME type (exact match)

member.name: P:MetadataFilter.MimeTypePrefix
member.summary: Filter by MIME type prefix (e.g., "text/" matches text/plain, text/html)

member.name: P:MetadataFilter.PathPattern
member.summary: Filter by original path pattern (supports * wildcard)

member.name: P:MetadataFilter.CreatedAfter
member.summary: Filter documents created after this date

member.name: P:MetadataFilter.CreatedBefore
member.summary: Filter documents created before this date

member.name: P:MetadataFilter.CustomMetadata
member.summary: Filter by custom metadata key-value pairs (all must match)

member.name: P:MetadataFilter.Tags
member.summary: Filter by tags (document must have ALL specified tags)

member.name: P:MetadataFilter.AnyTags
member.summary: Filter by tags (document must have ANY of the specified tags)

member.name: P:MetadataFilter.IsBinary
member.summary: Include only binary files

member.name: P:MetadataFilter.Limit
member.summary: Maximum number of results to return

member.name: P:MetadataFilter.Offset
member.summary: Skip this many results (for pagination)

member.name: P:MetadataFilter.IsEmpty
member.summary: Returns true if no filters are set

member.name: T:IDocumentStore
member.summary: Interface for managing a document store with RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) capabilities.

remarks.para:
A document store combines three underlying stores:
- Stores the actual document content (files)
- Stores vector embeddings for semantic search
Parts Store - Stores document chunks for efficient retrieval
Documents are automatically split into chunks and embedded for semantic search when stored. Use to find documents relevant to a query.

member.name: P:IDocumentStore.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of this document store.
member.remarks: The name is used to identify the store in multi-store configurations and agent setups.

member.name: P:IDocumentStore.EmbeddingStore
member.summary: Gets the underlying embedding store used for vector similarity search.

member.name: P:IDocumentStore.TextStore
member.summary: Gets or sets the underlying text store where document content is persisted.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.GetPath(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the file system path for a document by its key.
member.returns: The full file path to the document.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.Get(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the content of a document by its key.
member.returns: The document content as a string.
member.exception: Thrown if the document doesn't exist.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.GetChunk(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a specific chunk by its chunk key.
member.returns: The chunk text, or null if not found.
member.remarks: Documents are split into chunks for better semantic search. Each chunk has a key in the format "{documentKey} part {chunkIndex}".

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.GetDocumentWithChunks(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a document with all its metadata and chunk keys.
member.returns: A object containing the full document, metadata, and chunk keys.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.Store(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a text document to the document store.
member.param: The key under which to store the document.
Optional metadata for the document (e.g., author, date, tags).
Whether to split the document into chunks for RAG. Default is true.
member.returns: True if the document was stored successfully.
member.remarks: After storing, call or to generate vector embeddings.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.Store(System.String,System.Byte[],System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Adds a binary document to the document store.
member.param: The key under which to store the document.
MIME type of the binary content (e.g., "application/pdf", "image/png").
member.returns: True if the document was stored successfully.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.StoreFromFile(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Adds a document from a file path.
member.param: The key under which to store the document.
Path to the file to store.
member.returns: True if the document was stored successfully.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.GetMetadata(System.String)
member.summary: Gets metadata for a document.
member.returns: Document metadata or null if not found.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.Embed(System.String)
member.summary: Generates and stores the vector embedding for a single document.
member.returns: True if embedding was successful.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.Remove(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a document from the store.
member.returns: True if the document was removed successfully.
member.remarks: This removes the document content, chunks, and embeddings.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.Move(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Moves/renames a document within the store.
member.param: Whether to re-split the document after moving.
member.returns: True if the move was successful.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.Tree
member.summary: Returns the document hierarchy as a tree structure.
member.returns: A list of tree nodes representing the folder/file structure.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.List(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Lists all documents in the store, optionally filtered by folder.
member.param: Optional folder path to filter by.
If true, includes documents in subfolders.
member.returns: A list of document keys.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.UpdateEmbeddings
member.summary: Updates embeddings for all documents that have changed or are missing embeddings.
member.returns: A task that completes when all embeddings are updated.
member.remarks: Call this after adding or modifying documents to ensure the semantic search index is current. Only documents that have changed since their last embedding are re-embedded.

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.RelevantItems(System.String)
member.summary: Finds documents relevant to the given query using semantic similarity.
member.returns: A list of document keys ordered by relevance (most relevant first).

member.name: M:IDocumentStore.Embeddings(System.String)
member.summary: Gets embeddings with similarity scores for a query.
member.returns: A list of objects with similarity scores.
member.remarks: Use this instead of when you need the similarity scores or want more control over the results.

member.name: T:IHierarchicalMetadataStore
member.summary: Metadata store with hierarchical scope support. Enables knowledge sharing across projects and workspaces.

member.name: M:IHierarchicalMetadataStore.GetScopeHierarchyAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the scope hierarchy for a project.

member.name: M:IHierarchicalMetadataStore.QueryHierarchicalAsync(System.String,MetadataFilter,HierarchicalQueryOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Query documents across multiple scopes.

member.name: M:IHierarchicalMetadataStore.SearchTextHierarchicalAsync(System.String,System.String,MetadataFilter,HierarchicalQueryOptions,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Search text across multiple scopes.

member.name: M:IHierarchicalMetadataStore.StoreInScopeAsync(System.String,KnowledgeScope,System.String,DocumentMetadata,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Store a document in a specific scope.

member.name: M:IHierarchicalMetadataStore.GetFromScopeAsync(System.String,KnowledgeScope,MetadataFilter,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get documents from a specific scope.

member.name: M:IHierarchicalMetadataStore.MoveToScopeAsync(System.String,System.String,KnowledgeScope,System.String,KnowledgeScope,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Move a document to a different scope.

member.name: M:IHierarchicalMetadataStore.PromoteToParentScopeAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Copy a document to a parent scope (promote).

member.name: M:IHierarchicalMetadataStore.ConfigureScopesAsync(System.String,ScopeHierarchy,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Configure scope hierarchy for a project.

member.name: T:IIncrementalEmbeddingService
member.summary: Service for incremental document embedding. Only re-embeds chunks that have changed, reducing API costs.

member.name: M:IIncrementalEmbeddingService.ComputeDiffAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{ContentChunk},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Compute which chunks need embedding vs can use cache.
member.returns: Diff showing what needs embedding

member.name: M:IIncrementalEmbeddingService.EmbedIncrementallyAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{ContentChunk},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Embed only the chunks that need it (new + modified).
member.param: If true, ignore cache and re-embed all
member.returns: Embedding result with statistics

member.name: M:IIncrementalEmbeddingService.GetChunkHashesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get stored chunk hashes for a document.

member.name: M:IIncrementalEmbeddingService.StoreChunkEmbeddingsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{ChunkEmbeddingRecord},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Store chunk embeddings and hashes.

member.name: M:IIncrementalEmbeddingService.DeleteChunkEmbeddingsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete embeddings for removed chunks.

member.name: M:IIncrementalEmbeddingService.GetStatisticsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get embedding statistics for a document.

member.name: T:IncrementalEmbeddingResult
member.summary: Result of incremental embedding operation.

member.name: P:IncrementalEmbeddingResult.DocumentId
member.summary: Document that was processed.

member.name: P:IncrementalEmbeddingResult.TotalChunks
member.summary: Total chunks in document.

member.name: P:IncrementalEmbeddingResult.NewlyEmbedded
member.summary: Chunks that were newly embedded.

member.name: P:IncrementalEmbeddingResult.ReEmbedded
member.summary: Chunks that were re-embedded due to changes.

member.name: P:IncrementalEmbeddingResult.CachedUsed
member.summary: Chunks that used cached embeddings.

member.name: P:IncrementalEmbeddingResult.Deleted
member.summary: Chunks that were deleted.

member.name: P:IncrementalEmbeddingResult.Failed
member.summary: Chunks that failed to embed.

member.name: P:IncrementalEmbeddingResult.EstimatedCostSaved
member.summary: Total API cost saved by using cache.

member.name: P:IncrementalEmbeddingResult.Duration
member.summary: Time taken for embedding operation.

member.name: P:IncrementalEmbeddingResult.Success
member.summary: Whether operation was successful.

member.name: P:IncrementalEmbeddingResult.CacheHitRate
member.summary: Cache hit rate as percentage.

member.name: P:IncrementalEmbeddingResult.Errors
member.summary: Error messages if any failures occurred.

member.name: T:ChunkEmbeddingRecord
member.summary: Record of a chunk's embedding.

member.name: P:ChunkEmbeddingRecord.ChunkId
member.summary: Chunk identifier.

member.name: P:ChunkEmbeddingRecord.ContentHash
member.summary: Content hash at time of embedding.

member.name: P:ChunkEmbeddingRecord.Embedding
member.summary: The embedding vector.

member.name: P:ChunkEmbeddingRecord.Model
member.summary: Model used for embedding.

member.name: P:ChunkEmbeddingRecord.ComputedAt
member.summary: When embedding was computed.

member.name: P:ChunkEmbeddingRecord.TokenCount
member.summary: Token count of the content.

member.name: T:EmbeddingStatistics
member.summary: Embedding statistics for a document.

member.name: P:EmbeddingStatistics.TotalChunks
member.summary: Total chunks in document.

member.name: P:EmbeddingStatistics.EmbeddedChunks
member.summary: Chunks with embeddings.

member.name: P:EmbeddingStatistics.PendingChunks
member.summary: Chunks pending embedding.

member.name: P:EmbeddingStatistics.LastUpdated
member.summary: Last embedding update time.

member.name: P:EmbeddingStatistics.Model
member.summary: Embedding model used.

member.name: P:EmbeddingStatistics.TotalTokens
member.summary: Total tokens embedded.

member.name: P:EmbeddingStatistics.EstimatedCost
member.summary: Estimated embedding cost.

member.name: T:IQueryIntentClassifier
member.summary: Classifies query intent to route to optimal search strategies.

member.name: M:IQueryIntentClassifier.ClassifyAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Classify the intent of a search query.
member.returns: Classified intent with extracted filters

member.name: M:IQueryIntentClassifier.Classify(System.String)
member.summary: Synchronous classification (for simple/fast classifiers).

member.name: T:ITagRelevanceStore
member.summary: Persistence layer for tag relevance indices. Stores and retrieves tag scores for different query contexts.

member.name: M:ITagRelevanceStore.StoreAsync(TagRelevanceIndex,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Store a tag relevance index.

member.name: M:ITagRelevanceStore.GetByIdAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieve index by its ID.

member.name: M:ITagRelevanceStore.GetByChecksumAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieve index by query context checksum (for cache lookup).

member.name: M:ITagRelevanceStore.GetLatestAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the most recent index (useful for default scoring).

member.name: M:ITagRelevanceStore.ListAllAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List all stored indices.

member.name: M:ITagRelevanceStore.DeleteAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete an index by ID.

member.name: M:ITagRelevanceStore.CleanupOlderThanAsync(System.DateTime,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete indices older than the specified date.

member.name: T:ITagScoringService
member.summary: Service for scoring tags based on query relevance. Can use LLM or rule-based implementations.

member.name: M:ITagScoringService.ScoreTagsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Score a list of tags based on their relevance to a query/instruction. Returns a TagRelevanceIndex with scores for each tag.
member.param: The query or instruction to score against
member.returns: Tag relevance index with scores

member.name: M:ITagScoringService.GetOrComputeScoresAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get or compute tag scores for a query context. Uses cached scores if available, otherwise computes new ones.
member.param: The query or instruction to score against
Maximum age of cached scores to use
member.returns: Tag relevance index with scores

member.name: M:ITagScoringService.HasScoresForContextAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if scores are available for a query context.

member.name: T:ChunkSet
member.summary: Represents a logical grouping of chunks with a collective summary. Used for hierarchical documents where chunks can be organized by sections.

member.name: P:ChunkSet.SetId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this chunk set (e.g., "doc.txt:section:0").

member.name: P:ChunkSet.DocumentId
member.summary: Parent document ID.

member.name: P:ChunkSet.ChunkIds
member.summary: List of chunk IDs belonging to this set.

member.name: P:ChunkSet.Summary
member.summary: Summary describing the content of this chunk set.

member.name: P:ChunkSet.StartChunkIndex
member.summary: Zero-based index of the first chunk in this set.

member.name: P:ChunkSet.EndChunkIndex
member.summary: Zero-based index of the last chunk in this set.

member.name: P:ChunkSet.SectionTitle
member.summary: Optional section title from hierarchical chunking.

member.name: P:ChunkSet.Created
member.summary: When this chunk set was created.

member.name: P:ChunkSet.LastModified
member.summary: When this chunk set was last modified.

member.name: P:ChunkSet.ChunkCount
member.summary: Number of chunks in this set.

member.name: M:ChunkSet.Create(System.String,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Create a chunk set from a collection of chunk IDs.

member.name: T:ContentChunk
member.summary: Represents a chunk of document content with hash for change detection. Enables incremental embedding - only re-embed changed chunks.

member.name: P:ContentChunk.ChunkId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this chunk.

member.name: P:ContentChunk.DocumentId
member.summary: Parent document ID.

member.name: P:ContentChunk.ChunkIndex
member.summary: Zero-based index of this chunk within the document.

member.name: P:ContentChunk.Content
member.summary: The text content of this chunk.

member.name: P:ContentChunk.ContentHash
member.summary: Content hash for change detection (SHA256).

member.name: P:ContentChunk.Created
member.summary: When this chunk was created.

member.name: P:ContentChunk.LastModified
member.summary: When this chunk was last modified.

member.name: P:ContentChunk.HasEmbedding
member.summary: Whether this chunk has an embedding computed.

member.name: P:ContentChunk.EmbeddingModel
member.summary: The embedding model used (e.g., "openai", "local").

member.name: P:ContentChunk.EmbeddingComputedAt
member.summary: When the embedding was last computed.

member.name: P:ContentChunk.StartOffset
member.summary: Start character offset in original document.

member.name: P:ContentChunk.EndOffset
member.summary: End character offset in original document.

member.name: M:ContentChunk.ComputeHash
member.summary: Compute content hash from the current content.

member.name: M:ContentChunk.HasContentChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Check if content has changed by comparing hashes.

member.name: M:ContentChunk.ComputeContentHash(System.String)
member.summary: Compute SHA256 hash of content.

member.name: M:ContentChunk.Create(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a chunk from content.

member.name: T:ChunkEmbeddingStatus
member.summary: Status of a chunk embedding operation.

member.name: F:ChunkEmbeddingStatus.New
member.summary: Chunk is new and needs embedding.

member.name: F:ChunkEmbeddingStatus.Modified
member.summary: Chunk content has changed and needs re-embedding.

member.name: F:ChunkEmbeddingStatus.Cached
member.summary: Chunk is unchanged, cached embedding is valid.

member.name: F:ChunkEmbeddingStatus.Deleted
member.summary: Chunk was removed from document.

member.name: F:ChunkEmbeddingStatus.Processing
member.summary: Embedding is in progress.

member.name: F:ChunkEmbeddingStatus.Failed
member.summary: Embedding failed.

member.name: T:ChunkDiff
member.summary: Result of comparing document chunks for incremental updates.

member.name: P:ChunkDiff.NewChunks
member.summary: Chunks that are new and need embedding.

member.name: P:ChunkDiff.ModifiedChunks
member.summary: Chunks that have changed and need re-embedding.

member.name: P:ChunkDiff.UnchangedChunkIds
member.summary: Chunk IDs that are unchanged (use cached embeddings).

member.name: P:ChunkDiff.DeletedChunkIds
member.summary: Chunk IDs that no longer exist (delete embeddings).

member.name: P:ChunkDiff.ChunksToEmbed
member.summary: Total chunks that need embedding (new + modified).

member.name: P:ChunkDiff.CachedChunks
member.summary: Total chunks that can use cache.

member.name: P:ChunkDiff.CacheHitRate
member.summary: Percentage of chunks that can use cache (0-100).

member.name: P:DocumentMetadata.Tags
member.summary: Tags for categorization and filtering. Enables metadata-first search without embeddings.

member.name: P:DocumentMetadata.SearchableText
member.summary: Full-text searchable content (optional, for keyword search fallback). If not set, Summary is used for text search.

member.name: T:DocumentRelationship
member.summary: Represents a relationship between two documents.

member.name: P:DocumentRelationship.RelationshipId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this relationship.

member.name: P:DocumentRelationship.SourceDocumentId
member.summary: Source document ID.

member.name: P:DocumentRelationship.TargetDocumentId
member.summary: Target document ID.

member.name: P:DocumentRelationship.Type
member.summary: Type of relationship.

member.name: P:DocumentRelationship.Confidence
member.summary: Confidence score for this relationship (0.0 to 1.0). Higher values indicate more certain relationships.

member.name: P:DocumentRelationship.Source
member.summary: How this relationship was detected.

member.name: P:DocumentRelationship.Description
member.summary: Optional description of the relationship.

member.name: P:DocumentRelationship.Created
member.summary: When this relationship was created.

member.name: P:DocumentRelationship.LastUpdated
member.summary: When this relationship was last updated.

member.name: P:DocumentRelationship.Metadata
member.summary: Additional metadata about the relationship.

member.name: P:DocumentRelationship.IsBidirectional
member.summary: Whether this is a bidirectional relationship.

member.name: T:RelationshipType
member.summary: Types of document relationships.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.Related
member.summary: Generic relationship - documents are related.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.Supports
member.summary: Source supports the target's claims.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.Contradicts
member.summary: Source contradicts the target's claims.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.Cites
member.summary: Source cites or references the target.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.CitedBy
member.summary: Source is cited by the target.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.Summarizes
member.summary: Source summarizes the target.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.ExpandsOn
member.summary: Source expands on the target.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.UpdatesVersion
member.summary: Source is a newer version of the target.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.SameAuthor
member.summary: Source and target are by the same author.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.SameTopic
member.summary: Source and target cover the same topic.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.RespondsTo
member.summary: Source is a response to the target.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.ProvidesEvidence
member.summary: Source provides evidence for the target.

member.name: F:RelationshipType.DerivedFrom
member.summary: Source is derived from the target.

member.name: T:RelationshipSource
member.summary: How the relationship was detected.

member.name: F:RelationshipSource.Manual
member.summary: Manually specified by user.

member.name: F:RelationshipSource.LLMDetected
member.summary: Detected by LLM analysis.

member.name: F:RelationshipSource.CitationParsing
member.summary: Detected by citation parsing.

member.name: F:RelationshipSource.SemanticSimilarity
member.summary: Detected by semantic similarity.

member.name: F:RelationshipSource.ContentOverlap
member.summary: Detected by content overlap.

member.name: F:RelationshipSource.MetadataInference
member.summary: Inferred from metadata (e.g., same author).

member.name: T:DocumentNode
member.summary: A node in the document graph.

member.name: P:DocumentNode.DocumentId
member.summary: Document identifier.

member.name: P:DocumentNode.Title
member.summary: Document title or name.

member.name: P:DocumentNode.OutgoingRelationships
member.summary: Outgoing relationships from this document.

member.name: P:DocumentNode.IncomingRelationships
member.summary: Incoming relationships to this document.

member.name: P:DocumentNode.RelatedDocumentIds
member.summary: All related document IDs (both directions).

member.name: P:DocumentNode.RelationshipCount
member.summary: Count of all relationships.

member.name: T:GraphTraversalResult
member.summary: Result of traversing the document graph.

member.name: P:GraphTraversalResult.StartDocumentId
member.summary: Starting document ID.

member.name: P:GraphTraversalResult.Documents
member.summary: Documents found in traversal, ordered by relevance/distance.

member.name: P:GraphTraversalResult.TotalFound
member.summary: Total documents found.

member.name: P:GraphTraversalResult.MaxDepthReached
member.summary: Maximum depth reached in traversal.

member.name: T:TraversedDocument
member.summary: A document found during graph traversal.

member.name: P:TraversedDocument.DocumentId
member.summary: Document identifier.

member.name: P:TraversedDocument.Distance
member.summary: Distance from start document (number of hops).

member.name: P:TraversedDocument.Path
member.summary: Path of relationship types from start to this document.

member.name: P:TraversedDocument.PathConfidence
member.summary: Combined confidence along the path.

member.name: P:TraversedDocument.Relationship
member.summary: The relationship that led to this document.

member.name: P:DocumentWithChunks.Key
member.summary: The document key/ID

member.name: P:DocumentWithChunks.Content
member.summary: The full text content of the document

member.name: P:DocumentWithChunks.Metadata
member.summary: Document metadata

member.name: P:DocumentWithChunks.ChunkKeys
member.summary: List of chunk keys for this document

member.name: T:KnowledgeScope
member.summary: Scope levels for knowledge sharing.

member.name: F:KnowledgeScope.Project
member.summary: Project-specific knowledge (default, most restrictive).

member.name: F:KnowledgeScope.Workspace
member.summary: Workspace-level knowledge (shared across projects in workspace).

member.name: F:KnowledgeScope.Global
member.summary: Global knowledge (shared across all projects and workspaces).

member.name: T:ScopeConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for a knowledge scope.

member.name: P:ScopeConfiguration.Scope
member.summary: Scope level.

member.name: P:ScopeConfiguration.ScopeId
member.summary: Identifier for this scope (project ID, workspace ID, or "global").

member.name: P:ScopeConfiguration.Name
member.summary: Display name for this scope.

member.name: P:ScopeConfiguration.StorePath
member.summary: Path to the knowledge store for this scope.

member.name: P:ScopeConfiguration.ParentScopeId
member.summary: Parent scope (null for global).

member.name: P:ScopeConfiguration.Enabled
member.summary: Whether this scope is enabled for queries.

member.name: P:ScopeConfiguration.Priority
member.summary: Priority when merging results (higher = more important).

member.name: T:ScopeHierarchy
member.summary: Hierarchy of scopes for a project.

member.name: P:ScopeHierarchy.Project
member.summary: Project-level scope (most specific).

member.name: P:ScopeHierarchy.Workspace
member.summary: Workspace-level scope (if applicable).

member.name: P:ScopeHierarchy.Global
member.summary: Global scope (least specific).

member.name: M:ScopeHierarchy.GetInheritanceChain
member.summary: Get all enabled scopes in inheritance order (project → workspace → global).

member.name: T:ScopedDocument
member.summary: A document with its scope information.

member.name: P:ScopedDocument.Document
member.summary: Document metadata.

member.name: P:ScopedDocument.SourceScope
member.summary: Scope where this document was found.

member.name: P:ScopedDocument.SourceScopeId
member.summary: Scope identifier.

member.name: P:ScopedDocument.IsInherited
member.summary: Whether this document is inherited (from parent scope).

member.name: P:ScopedDocument.RelevanceScore
member.summary: Original similarity/relevance score.

member.name: P:ScopedDocument.AdjustedScore
member.summary: Adjusted score after scope weighting.

member.name: T:HierarchicalQueryResult
member.summary: Result of a hierarchical query.

member.name: P:HierarchicalQueryResult.Documents
member.summary: Documents found, merged and ranked.

member.name: P:HierarchicalQueryResult.CountByScope
member.summary: Count of documents per scope.

member.name: P:HierarchicalQueryResult.QueriedScopes
member.summary: Scopes that were queried.

member.name: P:HierarchicalQueryResult.TotalCount
member.summary: Total documents found.

member.name: P:HierarchicalQueryResult.IncludesInheritedDocuments
member.summary: Whether any inherited documents were included.

member.name: T:HierarchicalQueryOptions
member.summary: Options for hierarchical queries.

member.name: P:HierarchicalQueryOptions.IncludeParentScopes
member.summary: Whether to include parent scopes in query. Default: true

member.name: P:HierarchicalQueryOptions.MaxScope
member.summary: Maximum scope level to query. Default: Global (query all levels)

member.name: P:HierarchicalQueryOptions.ProjectWeight
member.summary: Weight multiplier for project-level results. Default: 1.0

member.name: P:HierarchicalQueryOptions.WorkspaceWeight
member.summary: Weight multiplier for workspace-level results. Default: 0.8

member.name: P:HierarchicalQueryOptions.GlobalWeight
member.summary: Weight multiplier for global-level results. Default: 0.6

member.name: P:HierarchicalQueryOptions.DuplicateHandling
member.summary: How to handle duplicates across scopes. Default: PreferMostSpecific

member.name: P:HierarchicalQueryOptions.MaxResultsPerScope
member.summary: Maximum results per scope. Default: 20

member.name: M:HierarchicalQueryOptions.GetWeight(KnowledgeScope)
member.summary: Get weight for a scope.

member.name: T:DuplicateHandling
member.summary: How to handle duplicate documents across scopes.

member.name: F:DuplicateHandling.PreferMostSpecific
member.summary: Keep the version from the most specific scope.

member.name: F:DuplicateHandling.PreferLeastSpecific
member.summary: Keep the version from the least specific scope.

member.name: F:DuplicateHandling.KeepAll
member.summary: Keep all versions.

member.name: F:DuplicateHandling.Merge
member.summary: Merge metadata from all scopes.

member.name: T:QueryIntentType
member.summary: Represents the detected intent of a search query. Used to route queries to optimal search strategies.

member.name: F:QueryIntentType.Semantic
member.summary: Semantic/conceptual search - needs embeddings. Examples: "What is the main thesis?", "Explain the argument"

member.name: F:QueryIntentType.MetadataFilter
member.summary: Metadata filter - SQL only, no embeddings needed. Examples: "Find PDFs from last week", "Show all images"

member.name: F:QueryIntentType.TagSearch
member.summary: Tag-based search - filter by tags, optional embeddings. Examples: "Documents tagged evidence", "Find research materials"

member.name: F:QueryIntentType.Similarity
member.summary: Similarity search - find documents similar to a reference. Examples: "Similar to document X", "More like this"

member.name: F:QueryIntentType.Keyword
member.summary: Keyword/exact match search - full-text search. Examples: "Search for 'climate change'", "Find mentions of X"

member.name: F:QueryIntentType.Hybrid
member.summary: Hybrid search - combine multiple strategies. Examples: "Recent PDFs about climate change"

member.name: F:QueryIntentType.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown or ambiguous intent.

member.name: T:QueryIntent
member.summary: Result of query intent classification.

member.name: P:QueryIntent.Type
member.summary: Primary detected intent type.

member.name: P:QueryIntent.Confidence
member.summary: Confidence score for the classification (0.0 to 1.0).

member.name: P:QueryIntent.SecondaryType
member.summary: Secondary intent if hybrid search is detected.

member.name: P:QueryIntent.Filters
member.summary: Extracted metadata filters from the query.

member.name: P:QueryIntent.SemanticQuery
member.summary: The semantic/keyword portion of the query after filter extraction.

member.name: P:QueryIntent.RecommendEmbeddings
member.summary: Whether embeddings are recommended for this query.

member.name: P:QueryIntent.RecommendMetadataFilter
member.summary: Whether metadata filtering should be applied.

member.name: P:QueryIntent.Explanation
member.summary: Explanation of why this intent was detected.

member.name: T:ExtractedFilters
member.summary: Filters extracted from a query.

member.name: P:ExtractedFilters.MimeType
member.summary: MIME type filter (e.g., "application/pdf").

member.name: P:ExtractedFilters.MimeTypePrefix
member.summary: MIME type prefix (e.g., "image/").

member.name: P:ExtractedFilters.Tags
member.summary: Tags to filter by (ANY match).

member.name: P:ExtractedFilters.CreatedAfter
member.summary: Date filter - after this date.

member.name: P:ExtractedFilters.CreatedBefore
member.summary: Date filter - before this date.

member.name: P:ExtractedFilters.SimilarToDocumentId
member.summary: Reference document ID for similarity search.

member.name: P:ExtractedFilters.ExactKeywords
member.summary: Exact keywords to search for.

member.name: P:ExtractedFilters.HasFilters
member.summary: Whether any filters were extracted.

member.name: M:ExtractedFilters.ToMetadataFilter
member.summary: Convert to MetadataFilter for store queries.

member.name: T:ScoredDocument
member.summary: Represents a document with its scoring information. Used during the ranking process.

member.name: P:ScoredDocument.Id
member.summary: Document identifier.

member.name: P:ScoredDocument.Content
member.summary: Document content or text.

member.name: P:ScoredDocument.Similarity
member.summary: Original similarity score from vector search (0.0 to 1.0).

member.name: P:ScoredDocument.TagScore
member.summary: Tag-based relevance score (0.0 to 1.0). Computed from TagRelevanceIndex.

member.name: P:ScoredDocument.RecencyScore
member.summary: Recency score based on document creation date (0.0 to 1.0).

member.name: P:ScoredDocument.PositionScore
member.summary: Position score based on original retrieval order (0.0 to 1.0).

member.name: P:ScoredDocument.CompositeScore
member.summary: Final composite score after applying weights (0.0 to 1.0).

member.name: P:ScoredDocument.Metadata
member.summary: Document metadata containing tags, MIME type, etc.

member.name: P:ScoredDocument.ScoreBreakdown
member.summary: Additional scoring details for debugging/transparency.

member.name: P:ScoredDocument.Explanation
member.summary: Detailed explanation of why this document scored as it did. Only populated when explanations are requested.

member.name: M:ScoredDocument.FromMetadata(DocumentMetadata,System.Double)
member.summary: Create a scored document from metadata and similarity.

member.name: T:ScoringOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for composite document scoring. Weights should sum to 1.0 for normalized results.

member.name: P:ScoringOptions.CosineSimilarityWeight
member.summary: Weight for cosine similarity score (embedding-based). Default: 0.5 (50% weight)

member.name: P:ScoringOptions.TagScoreWeight
member.summary: Weight for tag-based relevance score. Default: 0.3 (30% weight)

member.name: P:ScoringOptions.RecencyWeight
member.summary: Weight for recency boost (newer documents score higher). Default: 0.1 (10% weight)

member.name: P:ScoringOptions.PositionWeight
member.summary: Weight for position/order boost (earlier results from initial retrieval). Default: 0.1 (10% weight)

member.name: P:ScoringOptions.RecencyHalfLifeDays
member.summary: Number of days until recency score halves. Older documents decay exponentially. Default: 30 days

member.name: P:ScoringOptions.TagAggregation
member.summary: Aggregation method for multiple tags.

member.name: P:ScoringOptions.MinimumScore
member.summary: Minimum score threshold. Documents below this are filtered out. Default: 0.0 (no filtering)

member.name: P:ScoringOptions.Default
member.summary: Default scoring options (balanced weights).

member.name: P:ScoringOptions.EmbeddingFocused
member.summary: Scoring options that prioritize embedding similarity.

member.name: P:ScoringOptions.TagFocused
member.summary: Scoring options that prioritize tag relevance.

member.name: P:ScoringOptions.SimilarityOnly
member.summary: Scoring options for backwards compatibility (similarity only).

member.name: T:TagAggregationMethod
member.summary: Method for aggregating scores from multiple tags.

member.name: F:TagAggregationMethod.Maximum
member.summary: Use the highest score among all tags (optimistic).

member.name: F:TagAggregationMethod.Average
member.summary: Use the average score of all tags.

member.name: F:TagAggregationMethod.Sum
member.summary: Use the sum of all scores (capped at 1.0).

member.name: T:SearchResultExplanation
member.summary: Explains why a document received its search ranking score. Provides transparency into the scoring algorithm for debugging and user trust.

member.name: P:SearchResultExplanation.Summary
member.summary: Human-readable summary of why this result ranked where it did.

member.name: P:SearchResultExplanation.Breakdown
member.summary: Detailed breakdown of each scoring component.

member.name: P:SearchResultExplanation.Boosts
member.summary: Factors that boosted this result's score.

member.name: P:SearchResultExplanation.Penalties
member.summary: Factors that penalized this result's score.

member.name: M:SearchResultExplanation.GenerateSummary(ScoreBreakdownDetail)
member.summary: Generate a human-readable summary from the breakdown.

member.name: T:ScoreBreakdownDetail
member.summary: Detailed breakdown of scoring components.

member.name: T:SimilarityDetail
member.summary: Similarity score details.

member.name: T:TagScoreDetail
member.summary: Tag score details.

member.name: T:RecencyDetail
member.summary: Recency score details.

member.name: T:PositionDetail
member.summary: Position score details.

member.name: T:TagRelevanceIndex
member.summary: Stores tag relevance scores for a specific query context. Used for query-adaptive document ranking.

member.name: P:TagRelevanceIndex.IndexId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this index.

member.name: P:TagRelevanceIndex.QueryContext
member.summary: The query or instruction that was used to generate these scores.

member.name: P:TagRelevanceIndex.ContextChecksum
member.summary: MD5 checksum of the query context for cache lookup.

member.name: P:TagRelevanceIndex.Created
member.summary: When this index was created.

member.name: P:TagRelevanceIndex.LastUpdated
member.summary: When this index was last updated.

member.name: P:TagRelevanceIndex.TagScores
member.summary: Tag name → Relevance score (0.0 to 1.0). 1.0 = Highly relevant to the query. 0.5 = Neutral/uncertain relevance. 0.0 = Not relevant at all.

member.name: M:TagRelevanceIndex.GetScore(System.String)
member.summary: Get the relevance score for a specific tag. Returns 0.5 (neutral) if tag not found.

member.name: M:TagRelevanceIndex.GetAggregateScore(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Calculate aggregate score for a list of tags. Uses the maximum score among all tags (optimistic matching).

member.name: M:TagRelevanceIndex.GetAverageScore(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Calculate weighted aggregate score for a list of tags. Uses average of all tag scores.

member.name: T:DefaultCompositeScorer
member.summary: Default implementation of composite document scoring. Combines cosine similarity, tag relevance, recency, and position into a final score.

member.name: M:DefaultCompositeScorer.Score(ScoredDocument,TagRelevanceIndex,System.Int32,System.Int32,ScoringOptions)
member.summary: Score a single document using all available signals.

member.name: M:DefaultCompositeScorer.ScoreAndRank(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ScoredDocument},TagRelevanceIndex,ScoringOptions)
member.summary: Score and rank a list of documents.

member.name: M:DefaultCompositeScorer.ScoreAndRankAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ScoredDocument},TagRelevanceIndex,ScoringOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Async version of ScoreAndRank.

member.name: M:DefaultCompositeScorer.ScoreAndRankWithExplanations(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ScoredDocument},TagRelevanceIndex,ScoringOptions)
member.summary: Score and rank documents with detailed explanations.

member.name: M:DefaultCompositeScorer.ScoreWithExplanation(ScoredDocument,TagRelevanceIndex,System.Int32,System.Int32,ScoringOptions)
member.summary: Score a document and generate a detailed explanation.

member.name: M:DefaultCompositeScorer.FormatAge(System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Format a timespan as a human-readable age description.

member.name: M:DefaultCompositeScorer.CalculateRecencyScore(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Double)
member.summary: Calculate recency score using exponential decay.

member.name: T:HeuristicQueryIntentClassifier
member.summary: Fast, pattern-based query intent classifier. Uses regex and keyword matching for instant classification.

member.name: T:IncrementalEmbeddingService
member.summary: Default implementation of incremental embedding service. Stores chunk hashes and embeddings in a file-based cache.

member.name: T:LLMQueryIntentClassifier
member.summary: LLM-based query intent classifier for accurate classification. Falls back to heuristic classifier if LLM fails.

member.name: T:QueryIntentResponse
member.summary: Response model for LLM query intent classification.

member.name: T:LLMTagScoringService
member.summary: LLM-based tag scoring service that uses AI to score tags based on query relevance.

member.name: M:LLMTagScoringService.#ctor(Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient,ITagRelevanceStore)
member.summary: Create an LLM tag scoring service.

member.name: M:LLMTagScoringService.ScoreTagsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Score tags based on their relevance to a query using LLM.

member.name: M:LLMTagScoringService.GetOrComputeScoresAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get or compute tag scores, using cache if available.

member.name: M:LLMTagScoringService.HasScoresForContextAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if scores exist for a query context.

member.name: T:TagScoreResponse
member.summary: Response model for tag scoring.

member.name: T:TagScoreItem
member.summary: Individual tag score item.

member.name: T:NoOpTagScoringService
member.summary: No-operation tag scoring service for backwards compatibility. Returns neutral scores (0.5) for all tags.

member.name: M:NoOpTagScoringService.ScoreTagsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns neutral scores for all tags (no actual scoring).

member.name: M:NoOpTagScoringService.GetOrComputeScoresAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Always computes new scores (no caching in NoOp implementation).

member.name: M:NoOpTagScoringService.HasScoresForContextAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Always returns false (no caching).

member.name: T:ChunkSetFileStore
member.summary: File-based storage for chunk sets. Stores chunk sets as JSON files with naming pattern: {documentId}.chunksets.json

member.name: M:ChunkSetFileStore.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Create a new chunk set file store.
member.param: Base directory for storing chunk set files.

member.name: M:ChunkSetFileStore.GetFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: Get the file path for a document's chunk sets.

member.name: M:ChunkSetFileStore.StoreAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{ChunkSet})
member.summary: Store chunk sets for a document.

member.name: M:ChunkSetFileStore.GetAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Get all chunk sets for a document.

member.name: M:ChunkSetFileStore.GetByIdAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific chunk set by ID.

member.name: M:ChunkSetFileStore.RemoveAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Remove all chunk sets for a document.

member.name: M:ChunkSetFileStore.ListDocumentIdsAsync
member.summary: List all document IDs that have chunk sets.

member.name: T:DocumentGraphFileStore
member.summary: File-based implementation of document graph store. Stores relationships in JSON files.

member.name: T:HierarchicalMetadataFileStore
member.summary: File-based implementation of hierarchical metadata store. Enables knowledge sharing across projects via scope inheritance.

member.name: T:QueryableMetadataFileStore
member.summary: File-based implementation of IQueryableMetadataStore. Stores metadata as individual JSON files and maintains an in-memory index for fast queries. The index is rebuilt on startup by scanning the metadata folder.

member.name: M:QueryableMetadataFileStore.EnsureIndexLoadedAsync
member.summary: Ensures the in-memory index is loaded from disk. Called lazily on first query operation.

member.name: M:QueryableMetadataFileStore.RefreshIndexAsync
member.summary: Force reload the index from disk.

member.name: T:TagRelevanceFileStore
member.summary: File-based implementation of ITagRelevanceStore. Stores tag relevance indices as JSON files.

member.name: M:TagRelevanceFileStore.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Create a file-based tag relevance store.
member.param: Directory to store tag relevance files

member.name: M:TagRelevanceFileStore.StoreAsync(TagRelevanceIndex,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Store a tag relevance index.

member.name: M:TagRelevanceFileStore.GetByIdAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get index by ID.

member.name: M:TagRelevanceFileStore.GetByChecksumAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get index by checksum (for cache lookup).

member.name: M:TagRelevanceFileStore.GetLatestAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the most recent index.

member.name: M:TagRelevanceFileStore.ListAllAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List all stored indices.

member.name: M:TagRelevanceFileStore.DeleteAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete an index by ID.

member.name: M:TagRelevanceFileStore.CleanupOlderThanAsync(System.DateTime,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete indices older than cutoff date.

member.name: T:TagRelevanceIndexEntry
member.summary: Index entry for fast checksum-based lookup.

member.name: T:QueryableMetadataMemoryStore
member.summary: In-memory implementation of IQueryableMetadataStore. Extends DocumentMetadataMemoryStore with query capabilities. Suitable for development, testing, and small datasets.
